description: Add Next.js error.tsx route boundaries to key app segments and wrap LessonRenderer with a component-level ErrorBoundary to prevent full-page crashes from unhandled render errors.
deviation_notes: All 5 phases complete. Added app/student/error.tsx, app/teacher/error.tsx, app/student/lesson/error.tsx, LessonRendererErrorBoundary, and 5 boundary tests.
